ogTitle: She Oaks vs Sheep Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in She Oaks and Sheep Hills.
heading: She Oaks vs Sheep Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between She Oaks, Victoria and Sheep Hills, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: She Oaks has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sheep Hills (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is She Oaks or Sheep Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: She Oaks has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Sheep Hills scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: She Oaks scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Sheep Hills scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in She Oaks or Sheep Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. She Oaks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
